The '''Grand Reception Hall''', or '''Grand Hall''', was an enormous building on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was located in an ancient part of the the city world near the [[Petrax Historic Quarter]] where the planetwide city had not been built over the top of older buildings. As of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall of Coruscant]], it was the oldest continuously-operating government building on Coruscant.

The Reception Hall was more than a thousand meters long with 14 tiers of seats and could seat about 500,000 sentient beings. This hall was also open-air and featured landing pads for shuttles and transports, which had to drop into an 'opening' between neighboring skyscrapers.

==History==
When the embassy of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] visited Coruscant in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the welcoming ceremony took place at the Grand Reception Hall.

In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] eavesdropped on [[Nil Spaar]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] with an [[audio telescope]] hidden within scrollwork on the ceiling of the Grand Hall.
